description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSBuild that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring changes to markdown files, licenses, and certain directories. Use a matrix job strategy to build on Windows with different versions of Visual Studio (2019, 2022), build types (Debug, Release), and platforms (x86, x64, ARM64). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, add MSBuild to PATH, and run various msbuild commands to build different solutions with different configurations and platforms.
